Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a Python dictionary representing the DECLARE model for the scenario The keys existence absence exactly_one init responded_existence coexistence response precedence succession etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define rules for each activity For each rule type we provide a dictionary mapping activities to support and confidence values The support is 1 0 presumably because all events satisfy But we can set support 1 0 and confidence 1 0 for all

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: But we need to decide which rules apply for example existence each activity must exist at least once in a trace In product design process maybe all activities must exist We can set existence for all activities

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Exactly one maybe exactly one occurrence of some activities like Final Launch FL per trace also maybe only one Idea Generation per product idea Usually one idea per product concept but we can set exactly_one for IG and FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Init initial activity is Idea Generation IG So init rule with IG as key with support 1 0 and confidence 1 0

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Responded existence if an activity occurs it must be followed by another specific activity later in the trace not necessarily immediately For example if Design Draft occurs then Technical Feasibility Check must occur later or if Cost Evaluation occurs then Prototype Creation must follow etc

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: That fits above chain like dependencies DD to TFC DD to CE TFC to PC CE to PC PC to LT LT to UT UT to AG AG to MP MP to FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Coexistence two activities both appear in the same trace not necessarily order For example TFC coexists with CE Also LT coexists with UT

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Response immediate adjacency constraints AG immediately followed by MP MP immediately followed by FL maybe TFC immediately followed by CE Not necessary though lets keep simple

Name: Validation - IND
Text: In DECLARE semantics response means A implies B eventually follows precedence means B implies A occurred earlier

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: However given scenario likely expects simple mapping using these keys they want representation structure wise rather than deep semantics correctness

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus produce dictionary with keys mapping each rule type to sub dictionaries mapping relevant activities pairs or singletons accordingly along with support 1 0 confidence 1 0 values

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For pair based rules like responded_existence they said value dict containing as keys the activities and corresponding value support and confidence They did not specify nested structure precisely

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Thus simplest approach Provide dictionary where each constraint type maps into sub dictionary listing relevant activities present under that constraint type along with metrics 1 0 and 1 0

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus produce final answer accordingly summarizing typical constraints list above using these categories accordingly while providing metrics values
